meaning: n.由腰部撑开的芭蕾舞用短裙
examples: When a reader scanned the QR code on Tutu by accident, Wangbao got angry, beginning to argue with Tutu.
The two robots are named Tutu and Wangbao.
Former Lord Chancellor Lord Falconer said he disagreed with Desmond Tutu and Sir Geoffrey.
Signatories to the letter included Costa Rican President Oscar Arias and Archbishop Desmond Tutu.
